pages.title: Wood Elf
pages.text: Stacks on the shared $(l:races/elf)Elf$(/l) base. Built for ranged ambush.

pages.title: Traits
pages.text: $(bold)Fleet of Foot.$(/) Movement speed +10%.$(br2)$(bold)Keen Shot.$(/) Bow and crossbow damage +20%.$(br2)$(bold)Forest Camouflage.$(/) While crouched and standing in foliage (tall grass, leaves), mobs lose sight of you. Armor stays visible.$(br2)No extra drawback. Only the shared elf frailty applies.
